title: astragalus tribuloides
intro: Astragalus tribuloides, also known as Tribulus terrestris, is a plant species belonging to the legume family. It is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Astragalus tribuloides include improving cardiovascular health, boosting testosterone levels, and enhancing immune function. Astragalus tribuloides is commonly prepared into herbal supplements, capsules, or tea, and can also be consumed as a powder or added to food and beverages.
